value.rationale: Agent Skills in Antigravity (Google) is a feature for loading and browsing local and global Agent Skills as plugins within the Antigravity agentic coding environment. This maps directly to the mcp-connectors capability (plugin/skills registry), and is a sub-feature of the existing Antigravity plugins product node. It covers only a slice of MCP connectors (specifically the Agent Skills plugin browsing/loading aspect), hence 'partial'.
